testcase.name: test_sitemap_xml_returns_valid_xml

failure.message:
assert ('/resume-optimizer' in '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>1.0</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/about</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/products</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/blog</loc><changefreq>daily</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/contact</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/web-mobile-development</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/seo</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.dio...pro-dashboard</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
</urlset>' or 'resume' in '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>1.0</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/about</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/products</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/blog</loc><changefreq>daily</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/contact</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/web-mobile-development</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/seo</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.dio...pro-dashboard</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
</urlset>')

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_iteration20_seo_referral_dashboard.py:122: in test_sitemap_xml_returns_valid_xml assert "/resume-optimizer" in content or "resume" in content E assert ('/resume-optimizer' in '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>1.0</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/about</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/products</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/blog</loc><changefreq>daily</changefreq><priority>0.9</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/contact</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.8</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/web-mobile-development</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/services/seo</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.7</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.dio...pro-dashboard</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/propertyhub-realestate</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/edulearn-academy</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/foodiego-delivery</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/portfolio/travelwise-booking</loc><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>0.6</priority></url>
</urlset>' or 'resume' in '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
 <url><loc>https://www.diocreations.eu/</loc><changefreq>weekly</changefreq><priority>1.0</priority></url>
